# DStudio Import: Anthropic Cybersecurity Skills

- Source: https://github.com/mukul975/Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills
- Imported commit: `04450304b12645cb2b974ab96d28c0664758a88d`
- Imported date: 2026-06-12
- License: Apache License 2.0
- Local license copy: `extension/gsa/third_party/anthropic-cybersecurity-skills/LICENSE`

This directory is a vendored copy of the upstream repository with its `.git`
metadata removed. Upstream files are kept unmodified; DStudio adapts loading,
catalog search, and prompt selection in its own code instead of editing the
imported skill files.
